introSection: Loop Coaster (Japanese: ザ・ループコースター) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Tojoko Toy Kingdom in Tojo, Hyōgo, Japan. The station and catch car lift hill are still standing to this day.
fullText:
Loop Coaster (Japanese: ザ・ループコースター) was a steel shuttle roller coaster previously located at Tojoko Toy Kingdom in Tojo, Hyōgo, Japan. The station and catch car lift hill are still standing to this day.



Yellow track and supports.
